info.title: Agni API
info.description: Agni API for managing agents, tools, widget settings, telephony, and integrations.

parameters.name: phone_number
parameters.description: The phone number to release (E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234)

post.description: Unified appointment management endpoint for GHL. Supports book, reschedule, cancel, suggest, and availability actions. No X-Api-Key required — org_id comes from the request body.
Unified appointment management endpoint for Cal.com. Supports book, reschedule, cancel, suggest, and availability actions. No X-Api-Key required — org_id comes from the request body.

get.description: Redirects the user to the GoHighLevel OAuth authorization flow.
Handles the OAuth callback from GHL and redirects to the frontend.

302.description: Redirect to frontend with success or failure flag

get.description: Redirects the user to the Cal.com OAuth authorization flow.
Handles the OAuth callback from Cal.com and redirects to the frontend.

302.description: Redirect to frontend with success or failure flag

get.description: Look up an event type by ID or slug.

BotPosition.description: Position of the bot widget on screen

reminder_max_count.description: Maximum number of reminders to send

end_call_after_silence.description: Whether to end the call after silence

post_call_analysis_model.description: Model to use for post-call analysis

analysis_summary_prompt.description: Prompt used for generating call summary

begin_message.description: Opening message spoken by the agent

start_speaker.description: Who speaks first: agent or user

bot_logo.description: URL of the bot logo image

is_active.description: Whether these widget settings are active

type.description: Type of phone number (e.g. sip, pstn)

friendly_name.description: Human-readable label for this telephony config

client_secret.description: Provider client secret or auth token

agent_id.description: UUID of the agent handling the appointment

email.description: Customer email (required for book if no phone)

phone.description: Customer phone in E.164 format (required for book if no email)

appointment_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime for book or reschedule

appointment_id.description: Existing appointment ID (required for cancel and reschedule)

call_session_id.description: Optional call session ID for book

days_ahead.description: Days ahead to look for available slots (default: 7, max: 30). Used for suggest and availability.

message.description: Natural language message to relay directly to the user

summary.description: Short label (e.g. Appointment confirmed, Cancelled, Rescheduled)

appointment_id.description: Appointment ID (returned for book, reschedule, cancel)

agent_name.description: Name of the agent handling the appointment

action_required.description: Next action required if the request could not be completed (e.g. reschedule)

available_slots.description: Available time slots grouped by date (returned for suggest, availability, and slot-unavailable responses)

next_step.description: One of: CONNECT_GHL, CREATE_AGENT, or empty string when fully set up
